description_long: This is a rugged, single-bladed axe featuring a broad, weathered steel blade with visible scratches and wear, suggesting frequent use. The blade has a pronounced curve and a slightly pointed tip, with a thickened poll opposite the cutting edge. The handle is made of wood, showing a natural grain and a gentle curve, wrapped in several places with reddish-brown leather strips for improved grip and comfort. The mounting of the blade to the handle appears traditional, with a visible wedge securing the head. The overall design is utilitarian, with no visible branding but some decorative etching or wear patterns on the blade. This axe would be suitable for heavy-duty tasks in an urban environment, such as chopping wood or demolition work.
description: A weathered steel-bladed axe with a curved wooden handle wrapped in reddish-brown leather, showing signs of heavy use and decorative etching on the blade.
description_view_0: The axe is seen edge-on, highlighting the thickness of the blade and the curvature of the handle.
description_view_1: The full profile of the axe is visible, showing the broad, etched blade and the leather-wrapped wooden handle.
description_view_2: The handle is viewed from the side, emphasizing the leather grip and the attachment point of the blade.
description_view_3: The opposite side of the blade is visible, showing the blade's curve and the poll, as well as the handle's curvature and grip details.
attribute_handle_type: Curved wooden handle with visible grain, wrapped in reddish-brown leather strips for grip; oval cross-section, ergonomic and traditional style.
attribute_blade_design: Broad, single-edged steel blade with a pronounced curve, thick poll, and visible etching or wear marks; features a beard and a slightly pointed tip.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with the blade head fitted onto the handle and secured by a visible wedge.
